items.name_en: New
items.name_cn:
New
Bottega Veneta Small Woven Cloud Bag ☁ 2021's hottest🔥 The Pouch hand-woven lamb skin. The first series designed after Daniel Lee took over Celine. The silhouette is incredibly flattering~ stylish and chic~ elegant and minimalist, lazy yet intellectual. Style No.: 9918B💙💙Wide weave size:22*12*7⚠️

items.name_en: New Valentine's Capsule Collection [Gift] BOTTEGA VENETA New Women's CABAT Mini Tote. The small heart lights up the entire bag. This Valentine's collection features a white and red combination, symbolizing pure love. The mini cabat comes with a long shoulder strap, making it more convenient for daily life.
items.name_cn:
New Valentine's Capsule Collection [Gift] BOTTEGA VENETA New Women's CABAT Mini Tote. The small heart lights up the entire bag. This Valentine's collection features a white and red combination, symbolizing pure love. The mini cabat comes with a long shoulder strap, making it more convenient for daily life.
Style: 709464
Size: 22*6.5*15.5cm

items.name_en: Optional 8mm buckle strap + 100
items.name_cn:
Optional 8mm buckle strap + 100
Bottega Veneta BV Gemelli Twin Bag (Shu Qi Style) Pre-locked, 2024 Bestseller 💕 The Gemelli consists of two crescent bags paired together, featuring the brand's signature intrecciato weaving. It comes with a detachable tubular handle, serving as a clutch, shoulder bag, or with the small crescent flipped to serve as a handle. The dual design is full of personality and charm, creating a visual impact that brings an elegant and fashionable feel. The unique structural design creates duality and volume
Multiple carrying styles to meet different needs and occasions
Style No.: 764053
Size: 42*30*12cm

items.name_en: Reinventing the classic, the Swing is back. BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Swing Tote features tubular padded weaving, creating a unique vertical texture that is memorable. It exudes a vintage vibe, aligning with current retro trends. Simple yet versatile and personal, it adapts easily to different styles for work or commuting. Designed for both shoulder and hand carry, it is a bag that balances practicality and beauty [Jump][Jump]

Size: 25*19*6

items.name_en: The Bow Clasp (Butterfly Knot) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric, paired with chestnut leather, exudes a vintage vibe. A refreshing change from the all-leather version, it has a unique charm.

items.name_en: Top 2023 Spring/Summer new arrivals continue the brand's woven style with metal rope knot closures. This time, the shoulder strap is also made of tube weaving, presenting different craftsmanship. Versatile carrying styles to create more different looks. Intrecciato woven leather small handbag, comes with a sliding crossbody strap. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
items.name_cn:
Top 2023 Spring/Summer new arrivals continue the brand's woven style with metal rope knot closures. This time, the shoulder strap is also made of tube weaving, presenting different craftsmanship. Versatile carrying styles to create more different looks. Intrecciato woven leather small handbag, comes with a sliding crossbody strap. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
Size: 20*25*10.5cm, Model: 7463

specs.rawTitle:
Top 2023 Spring/Summer new arrivals continue the brand's woven style with metal rope knot closures. This time, the shoulder strap is also made of tube weaving, presenting different craftsmanship. Versatile carrying styles to create more different looks. Intrecciato woven leather small handbag, comes with a sliding crossbody strap. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
Size: 20*25*10.5cm, Model: 7463
